mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `position` (activity_id, name, description, quota, required_hours) VALUES (#{activityId}, #{name}, #{description}, #{quota}, #{requiredHours})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM `position` WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT id, activity_id, name, description, quota, assigned_count, required_hours, created_at FROM `position` WHERE activity_id = #{activityId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE `position` SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, quota = #{quota}, required_hours = #{requiredHours}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE `position` SET deleted = 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
